allowed_claim_sentence: Under frozen API_PARITY_D001, registry validation exited 0 and registry metadata matched the frozen expectation.
baseline_control_summary: Frozen validate_registry plus validate-all on the committed evidence index.
claim_boundary: This card verifies only that, on the access date, the frozen API_PARITY_D001 registry commands exited 0 and registry_name/card_count matched expectation. It does not prove production readiness, security certification, complete validator coverage or external API correctness.
known_limitations: Does not audit every validator rule or external API.
manual_review: The operator ran frozen registry commands and accepted only the narrow registry parity claim.
raw_payload_manifest: no raw payloads; gate exercised via repository validator only
runner_command: uv run python scripts/claimbound_validate_registry.py && uv run claimbound validate-all
source_rights_note: Public open-source repository; sanitized summary only.
